title: chaenorhinum minus f. australior
intro: Chaenorhinum minus f. australior, also known as dwarf toadflax, is a flowering plant species in the family Scrophulariaceae. It is used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant has been traditionally used to address colds, fever, and respiratory problems, offering health benefits such as relieving congestion and soothing sore throats. Chaenorhinum minus f. australior is prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
